title: AiAuthoringResurrectionProfilev1
description: Typed resurrection profile attached to ai-authoring-request-v1 and mirrored in runtime Lua profiles. Encodes ancestor identity, novelty targets, safety caps, and expected metric shifts for CHATDIRECTOR planning and runtime gating.

originId.description: Ancestor ID being resurrected (seed/event/persona/etc.). Must resolve to an existing registry entry at validation time.

ancestorKind.description: Kind of ancestor artifact used for resurrection planning (mirrors runtime telemetry vocabulary).

resurrectionKind.description: High-level category of resurrection requested, aligned with authoring and telemetry vocabularies.

resurrectionIntent.description: Designer- or AI-facing intent description. Never executed directly; used as a hint for planning and diagnostics.

summary.description: Short free-text description of the resurrection goal (e.g., 'softer reprise of corridor ambush').

notes.description: Optional longer notes for human reviewers.

noveltyBand.description: Target novelty distance band relative to the ancestor, expressed in the same distance metric used at runtime and in telemetry.

min.description: Minimum allowed normalized distance between ancestor and candidate; values near 0 mean near-identical, 1 is maximally different.

max.description: Maximum allowed normalized distance; keeps resurrections from drifting too far from the ancestor.

maxResurrectionsPerBranch.description: Soft limit on the number of resurrection attempts for this ancestor branch within a session or campaign. 0 can be interpreted as 'no explicit cap' by policy layers.

resurrectionWindow.description: Lifecycle window in which resurrections are allowed for this profile.

timePhases.description: Allowed temporal phases for this resurrection, matching event stage naming.

stages.description: Allowed global stages for this resurrection (session or campaign stages).

allowedMetricBands.description: Per-metric allowed absolute bands for resurrections under this profile, usually derived from ancestor aggregates and spine safeDefaults.

targetMetricDeltas.description: Intended per-metric deltas for this resurrection relative to the ancestor, used to guide authoring and to compare against telemetry.

safetyCaps.description: Invariant/metric safety caps that resurrections under this profile must not exceed, even if novelty or deltas would otherwise permit it.

distanceMetric.description: Identifier of the distance metric to use when computing novelty, shared across Rust, Lua, and telemetry.

distanceWeightsProfileId.description: Optional ID for a weights profile that controls how invariants and metrics are weighted when computing distance.

profileSource.description: Indicates how this profile was constructed.

profileVersion.description: Semantic version of the resurrection profile schema/logic used to compute defaults, e.g., 'rp.v1.0.0'.

metricBand.description: Absolute band for a single entertainment metric.

min.description: Minimum allowed value for this metric during a resurrection run.

max.description: Maximum allowed value for this metric during a resurrection run.

metricDeltaBand.description: Target delta band for a single entertainment metric relative to the ancestor.

deltaMin.description: Minimum allowed delta (after - before) for this metric.

deltaMax.description: Maximum allowed delta (after - before) for this metric.

invariantCap.description: Safety cap for an invariant like DET, expressed as an absolute maximum.

max.description: Maximum allowed invariant value for any resurrected contract under this profile.

metricCap.description: Safety cap for an entertainment metric such as CDL or ARR.

max.description: Maximum allowed metric value; interpretation (hard vs soft) is governed by validation rules.
